hooks.name: bash-danger-guard
hooks.description: Guards against dangerous bash commands by intercepting Bash tool calls and checking for rm -rf, chmod 777, curl | sh, and other high-risk patterns.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: create-checkpoint
hooks.description: Auto-saves uncommitted changes as a named git stash checkpoint at the end of each Claude session. Keeps the last 10 checkpoints. Never lose work after a Claude session.
hooks.author: nafistiham

hooks.name: dependency-audit
hooks.description: Runs a security audit after package install commands (npm install, pip install, pnpm add). Reports known vulnerabilities in newly added dependencies.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: env-leak-guard
hooks.description: Intercepts Bash commands that reference common secret patterns (API_KEY, SECRET, TOKEN, PASSWORD, PRIVATE_KEY) and blocks or warns before they run, preventing accidental credential leakage.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: file-size-guard
hooks.description: Warns when a written file exceeds the project's 800-line limit. Runs after Write and Edit tool calls, printing a warning with the line count so the agent can refactor proactively.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: format-on-write
hooks.description: Automatically formats files after Claude Code writes them. Detects the formatter based on file extension (prettier for JS/TS/JSON, black for Python, gofmt for Go).
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: git-commit-lint
hooks.description: Blocks git commit commands that don't follow Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description). Catches bad commit messages before they're written, keeping history clean.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: large-file-upload-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writing files larger than 5MB to prevent accidentally committing binaries, compiled artifacts, or data dumps into the repository.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: no-direct-push-guard
hooks.description: Blocks direct git push to main or master branches. Enforces a PR-based workflow by intercepting push commands and requiring a feature branch instead.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: port-scan-guard
hooks.description: Blocks network scanning and reconnaissance tools (nmap, masscan, zmap, netcat in scan mode) from being run via Bash. Prevents Claude from being used as a pivot for unauthorized network reconnaissance.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: sensitive-file-guard
hooks.description: Blocks writing or editing sensitive files — .env, private keys (.pem, id_rsa), credential files, and secrets configs. Prevents Claude from accidentally overwriting or leaking credentials.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: session-summary
hooks.description: Appends a concise session summary to a daily log file when a Claude Code session ends. Captures the session transcript path, duration, and any incomplete todos.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: sql-injection-guard
hooks.description: Detects SQL injection patterns in code being written — string concatenation into SQL queries, unparameterized queries with user input, and raw f-string/format SQL. Warns before the code is saved.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: test-on-edit
hooks.description: Automatically runs the project test suite after source files are written or edited. Detects the test runner (vitest, jest, pytest, go test) from the project and runs it in the background, printing results to stderr.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: todo-tracker
hooks.description: Counts TODO and FIXME comments in files after each write or edit. Warns if the count increases, helping keep technical debt visible without blocking progress.
hooks.author: hookpm

hooks.name: token-usage-logger
hooks.description: Logs token usage statistics at the end of every Claude session to ~/.hookpm/token-log.jsonl. Helps you track cumulative usage and spot expensive sessions.
hooks.author: hookpm
